categories.description: Confirmation that your invitation was delivered. Includes recipient email + share link + link to /me/referrals.
Sent to the referrer when the referred user landed on the signup page. Includes referral status + expected next step.
Sent to the referrer when the referred user completed signup. Includes reward pending status + when to expect vesting.

categories.display_name: Your reward is on the way
categories.description: Sent to the referrer (+ optionally referred for double-sided programs) when the reward vests. Includes reward amount + expected materialization time.

categories.display_name: Your referral reward is now available
categories.description: Sent to the recipient when the reward is paid (Finance credit issued). Includes reward summary + how to redeem.
Admin-facing. Sent to tenant admins + fraud reviewers when a ReferralFraudFlag with severity IN (block, critical) is created. Critical severity is cannot-opt-out.

Sent to the referrer + referred when a reward is clawed back. Includes reason (refund / chargeback / fraud / program archived) + any next-step guidance. Cannot-opt-out — user needs to know their reward was reversed.
Admin-facing. Sent when a program budget reaches 90% consumed OR spikes > 50% in 24h. Includes recent-referral rollup + suggested action (top up budget / pause program).
Sent to the referrer when they hit max_rewards_per_referrer OR max_rewards_per_period. Explains the cap + when it resets.
